walkthrough.title: Bob Capabilities Walkthrough
walkthrough.subtitle: Experience Bob's Enterprise-Scale Features
walkthrough.description: Learn how Bob transforms enterprise development through hands-on demonstrations
walkthrough.overview_desc: This walkthrough demonstrates Bob's key capabilities through a realistic scenario: implementing SSO + MFA across 3 legacy systems to pass a SOC 2 audit.
walkthrough.estimated_time_value: 10-15 minutes to complete all capability demos
walkthrough.upload_document_desc: In Bob, upload a PDF, Word doc, or text file containing business requirements.
walkthrough.review_analysis_desc: Bob returns a comprehensive breakdown including:
walkthrough.unique_no_competitor: Unique to Bob - No Competitor Has:
walkthrough.join_developers: Join thousands of developers using Bob to ship faster, safer, and with full compliance.

narrative.title: Customer Conversation Guide
narrative.subtitle: Talk Tracks for Bob Sales Discussions
narrative.description: Common customer questions and recommended responses based on Bob's unique capabilities
narrative.intro_desc: Opening the conversation about enterprise AI development
narrative.question_intro: What is Bob, and how is it different from other AI coding tools like Copilot?
narrative.security_desc: Bob has shift-left security - vulnerabilities are caught during code generation, not in security reviews weeks later. Here's how:
narrative.real_time_scanning_desc: As Bob generates code, it simultaneously checks for vulnerabilities
narrative.auto_correction_desc: If Bob generates code with a hardcoded secret, it self-corrects to use environment variables
narrative.prisma_integration_desc: AI-specific security scanning that catches issues traditional tools miss
narrative.zero_security_debt_desc: No accumulation of vulnerabilities that need fixing later
narrative.compliance_desc: For SOC 2, PCI-DSS, HIPAA - Bob generates compliance evidence as it writes code:
narrative.data_privacy: But what about data privacy? Does Bob send our code to external models?
narrative.data_privacy_response: Great question - this is critical for enterprises. Bob offers:
narrative.client_zero_proof_desc: 30,000 IBM developers use Bob daily on IBM's internal codebase
narrative.deployment_options_desc: Can run in your environment (Linux partitions on IBM systems with Spyre AI accelerator)
narrative.governance_controls_desc: Admin control over what code can be shared, model selection, cost limits per team
narrative.audit_trail_desc: Bobalytics shows every interaction for compliance tracking
narrative.microservices_complexity: We have microservices across 20+ repositories. Can Bob really handle that complexity?
narrative.microservices_response: Yes - this is exactly what Bob was built for.
narrative.single_repo_limitation: Most AI coding tools work on single files or single repos. They can't understand that a change in your auth-service requires updates to your user-service (Java), frontend (React), and API gateway.
narrative.real_example_task: The task: Add SSO and MFA across 3 systems to pass SOC 2 audit
narrative.for_your_repos_desc: Bob scales because it maintains context across your entire codebase, not just the files currently open in your IDE.
narrative.roi_justification: AI tools can get expensive quickly. How do we track costs? My CFO will ask for ROI justification.
narrative.bobalytics_unique: Bobalytics is unique to Bob - no other AI tool provides this level of transparency:
narrative.task_level_costing_desc: See exactly what each task cost (e.g., "$8.47 for SSO implementation")
narrative.team_dashboards_desc: Leadership can see productivity metrics, cost per team, usage patterns
narrative.budget_controls_desc: Set spending limits per team or project
narrative.roi_calculator_desc: Compare traditional cost vs Bob cost for every project
narrative.tools_integration: What tools does Bob integrate with? We use GitHub, Jenkins, and have strict deployment processes.
narrative.enterprise_workflows: Bob is designed to fit into enterprise workflows, not replace them:
narrative.workflow_how: How it works in your workflow:
narrative.using_copilot: We're already using Copilot. Why would we add Bob?
narrative.copilot_productivity: Copilot is great for individual developer productivity.
narrative.cant_do: Unique to Bob - Copilot Can't Do:
narrative.real_references: This all sounds great, but who's actually using this in production? I need real references.
narrative.before_external: Before any external customer, Bob was battle-tested inside IBM:
narrative.continue_desc: Explore Bob's capabilities hands-on or dive deeper into any topic
narrative.reads_business_requirements_desc: Upload a PDF spec, Bob understands what needs to be built
narrative.multi_repo_orchestration_desc: Coordinates changes across Java, Node.js, and React simultaneously
narrative.compliance_automation_desc: Generates SOC 2, PCI-DSS evidence as code is written
narrative.security_inline_desc: Catches vulnerabilities during generation, not days later
narrative.full_transparency_desc: Bobalytics shows exactly what you're spending and productivity gained
narrative.bottom_line_desc: We've seen 6,000+ IBM developers achieve 45% average productivity improvement. Projects that take 7-8 weeks traditionally get done in ~10 minutes with Bob.
narrative.skepticism: I understand the skepticism. Let me break down where that time savings comes from:
narrative.week_1_desc: Read business requirements, research existing systems
narrative.week_2_desc: Map compliance requirements to technical implementation
narrative.in_regulated_industry: We're in a regulated industry. How do we know Bob's generated code is secure? What about SOC 2 compliance?
narrative.hardcoded_secret_risk: Bob detected hardcoded secret and fixed it immediately, explaining why it was a risk.
narrative.upload_audit_findings: Upload audit findings → Bob maps each finding to specific code changes
narrative.bob_generates_evidence: Bob generates the code AND the evidence you'll show auditors
narrative.last_minute_scramble: No last-minute scramble to gather documentation
narrative.concert_proof: IBM Concert proof: Saved $84K per compliance project by automating this
narrative.key_difference_desc: Most AI tools help you write code. Bob helps you stay compliant while writing code.
narrative.data_sovereignty: We understand that for enterprise customers, data sovereignty and governance aren't features - they're requirements.
narrative.bobs_approach_step2: Bob identifies all 3 affected repos: auth-service (Node.js), user-service (Java), frontend (React)
narrative.bobs_approach_step3: Bob creates implementation plan with deployment order (auth → user → frontend)
narrative.bobs_approach_step4: Bob generates 17+ files across all 3 repos with proper integration points
narrative.bobs_approach_step5: Bob includes API contracts between services
narrative.traditional_approach_time: Traditional approach: 7-8 weeks with coordination across teams.
narrative.jenkins_integration: Jenkins, GitLab CI, GitHub Actions, Tekton
narrative.workflow_step1: Developer uses Bob in their IDE to generate code
narrative.workflow_step2: Code goes through your normal PR review process
narrative.workflow_step3: Bob integrates with your CI/CD pipeline for testing
narrative.workflow_step4: Deploy using your existing tools and processes
narrative.deployment_plans: Bob also generates deployment runbooks with zero-downtime strategies and rollback procedures - tailored to your infrastructure.
narrative.individual_dev_productivity: If your goal is to help developers write functions faster, Copilot works well.
narrative.bob_for_enterprise: Bob is for enterprise-scale challenges. Here's when you need Bob:
narrative.copilot_daily: Copilot for daily coding, Bob for the complex enterprise initiatives that span teams and require compliance oversight.
narrative.read_pdf: Read a 20-page business requirements PDF and map to code
narrative.generate_soc2_evidence: Generate SOC 2 audit evidence as code is written
narrative.show_exact_costs: Show you exactly what you're spending (Bobalytics)
narrative.catch_vulnerabilities: Catch security vulnerabilities during generation (not after)
narrative.battle_tested: Before any external customer, Bob was battle-tested inside IBM:
narrative.ibm_deployment: 30,000 developers in the IBM deployment ecosystem
narrative.activation_rate: 95% activation rate - developers voluntarily adopt it
narrative.productivity_gain: 85% productivity gain - completed in 1 day what previously took 4 weeks
narrative.saved_per_project: Saved $84,000 per compliance project by automating evidence generation
narrative.accelerated_delivery: Accelerated feature delivery across distributed teams
narrative.connect_teams: We can connect you with IBM product teams who are using Bob in production. They can speak directly to the productivity gains and how they've integrated it into their workflows.
